mod.name: Random Foreseer
page.title: Random Foreseer
page.description: Configure prediction features for random outcomes. Some settings may require Save & Load to take effect.
section.out_of_combat_prediction.title: Out-of-combat prediction
section.out_of_combat_prediction.descrip: Controls random outcomes shown outside combat.
section.in_combat_prediction.title: In-combat prediction
section.in_combat_prediction.description: Controls random outcomes shown during combat.
toggle.enable_transform_prediction.label: Predict transform results
toggle.enable_transform_prediction.descr: When enabled, deck transform confirmation previews show the exact card the current RNG will produce.
toggle.enable_potion_card_prediction.des: When enabled, random-card potion tooltips show the exact cards the current RNG will produce.
toggle.enable_combat_card_prediction.des: When enabled, combat card tooltips show the exact random cards the current RNG will generate.
toggle.enable_driftwood_reroll_predictio: When enabled, Driftwood's card reward reroll button shows the exact cards the reroll will offer.
toggle.enable_out_of_combat_relic_predic: When enabled, out-of-combat relic tooltips show immediate random results such as cards, relics, potions, curses, and transforms.
toggle.enable_frozen_eye.label: Enable Frozen Eye
toggle.enable_frozen_eye.description: When enabled, the combat draw pile view shows cards in draw order.
